reviews.comment:
Me atendieron bien, en especial Santiago.

Lo único malo es que tenes mucha fila para cargar combustible y en la costa en más caro. Si podes cargar antes de venir y hacerlo rendir, mejor.

(Translated by Google)
They treated me well, especially in Santiago.

The only downside is that there are long lines to fill up, and it's more expensive on the coast. If you can fill up before arriving and make the most of it, all the better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxNHFMb3pRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Varias islas p carga.  Cordialidad de trato.  Lamentable > > NO tienen Posnet p Modo y así los clientes perdemos los reintegros q ofrece el Sistema.

(Translated by Google)
Several charging stations. Friendly service. Unfortunately, they don't have a POS terminal, so customers lose the refunds offered by the system.
